title: • ::4_bl00m is the architect and father fig
content:
• ::4_bl00m is the architect and father figure—a multimedia self who builds systems, tools, and rituals that allow all of this to exist and grow. It’s about structure, design, and spiritual direction.
• ::ETCETER4 is my sound and performance identity—experimental pop, sound design, and musical worldbuilding.
• ::GR1ND3R is darker and raw—it’s found footage horror, psychological fiction, ambiguity and dread. More narrative-driven but rooted in the now.
• ::Q_v33R is autobiographical and communal—a non-fiction space for reflection, healing, podcasting, video essays, and sharing queer stories (mine and others).

Each of these is like a different voice or mode I operate in, but together they form one system. They’re modular—so I can build tools or structures in one, and have them affect the others. It’s recursive, generative, and always mutating—so no two outputs will ever be the same unless I want them to be.

Underneath it all, I’m building:
